assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope for Black Friday/Cyber Monday period (Nov 25 - Dec 3), which is within the 30-day limit and blocks all upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope for the entire June period (June 1-30) for the quarterly code freeze

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to block minor versions. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response does not address the requirement for permanent minor version control. It only disables auto-upgrades on node pools but doesn't use the appropriate 'no_minor' or 'no_minor_or_node' exclusion scopes or mention persistent exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the difference in duration limits between exclusion types

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope='NO_UPGRADES' flags for the timed exclusions

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response shows manual upgrade commands but does not explicitly mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or the potential security/support implications
